overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval fantasy town during golden hour. The character moves from a narrow shaded alley between fortress walls into sunlit village squares, passing various NPCs and historic stone buildings with red-tiled roofs.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between fortress wall and timber houses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow cobblestone alley between high stone walls

notable_agents.action: man in armor standing near wooden fence at alley entrance
woman in red dress standing near timber building

entered.detail: tall medieval stone wall with small windows running along the left side
traditional half-timbered building with plaster infill and dark wooden beams
low wooden picket fence lining the right side of the path
grassy strip between cobblestone path and stone wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow shaded alley between a tall stone fortress wall on the left and timber-framed houses on the right. Two NPCs stand near the entrance—a man in armor and a woman in a red dress—before the path continues empty into the shaded corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered merchant walkway with canvas awnings

events.description: enters darker covered area under wooden awning and canvas roof
passes a lit campfire or brazier providing warm orange light

agents.ego_description: walking through the darker covered section of the alleyway

entered.detail: wooden market stall with canvas awning overhead creating shade
burning fire pit with orange flames providing illumination
stacked wooden barrels beside the merchant stall

segments.scene_description: The path enters a darker covered section with canvas awnings overhead, blocking the sky. Geralt passes a wooden merchant stall and a burning campfire that casts warm light in the shaded alley. The stone fortress wall continues on the left while the right side features wooden structures and barrels.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village square with red-roofed stone buildings

events.description: exits dark alley into bright sunlit village square with golden hour lighting
villager gestures aggressively with hands toward Geralt as he passes by

agents.ego_description: walking through the sunlit square, passing a gesturing villager and other townsfolk

notable_agents.action: man gesturing with hands and body as Geralt approaches and passes him

entered.detail: large prominent stone building with distinctive red tiled roof and multiple windows
wooden wagon with large spoked wheels parked near building
piles of burlap sacks stacked near building entrance
external wooden staircase attached to stone building facade

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the dark alley into a bright sunlit village square bathed in golden hour light. A large stone building with a red roof dominates the view. He passes a wooden cart and sacks of goods before encountering a villager who gestures toward him. The atmosphere shifts from enclosed and dark to open and warm.

scene_state.functional_zone: main village street leading to stone archway gate

events.description: stone archway gate becomes visible in the distance marking the street end

agents.ego_description: continuing down the main street toward the distant archway, passing villagers

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress walking alongside and then passing Geralt

entered.detail: large medieval stone archway entrance at the end of the street
stone building with arched doorways and gothic architectural details
covered market stall with canvas roof on the left side

segments.scene_description: Geralt proceeds down the main village street lined with wooden market stalls and stone buildings. A large stone archway becomes visible in the distance, serving as a gateway. Various villagers walk along the street, including a woman in a dress who passes by on the right. The path leads steadily toward the archway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a narrow, shaded alleyway into a bright, open village square bathed in golden hour light. It begins with Geralt walking between a tall stone fortress wall and timber-framed houses, passing a man in armor and a woman in a red dress. As the path leads deeper into a darker covered section, canvas awnings block the sky and a burning campfire casts a warm glow against wooden stalls and barrels. The scene then opens abruptly as Geralt emerges from the shadows into a sunlit square dominated by a large red-roofed stone building, passing a wooden cart and a gesturing villager. Finally, the camera proceeds down the main village street lined with market stalls and pedestrians, moving steadily toward a large stone archway in the distance.
